harness.working_tree: Produced with the capability-conductor sampling + n_choices diff UNCOMMITTED on branch feat/capability-conductor (base 12f202d0). Re-seal against the commit once landed.

evidence.summary: n_choices_bounds_are_validated unit test (0 and >MAX_N_CHOICES rejected) + e2e per row: n=3 returns 3 choices with indices [0,1,2], distinct contents (independent per-choice seeds = base+i), prompt tokens counted once and completion tokens summed (e.g. 13/18/31). n>1+stream and n>1+camelid_receipt fail closed (HTTP 400).
